User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the ClarityFlow application.

Tenant.title: Tenant
Tenant.description: Represents a tenant (business) within the multi-tenant application, owned by a user.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this tenant.

subscriptionStatus.description: The current subscription status of the tenant.

subscriptionTier.description: The subscription tier of the tenant.

queueSkipTimeMinutes.description: Number of minutes a client has to claim their spot before being skipped.

lateArrivalGracePeriod.description: Grace period in minutes before an appointment is marked as late.

autoCancelLateArrivals.description: If true, automatically cancels appointments for clients who are late beyond the grace period.

cancellationFee.description: Fee charged for late cancellations or no-shows.

DayHours.title: Day Hours
DayHours.description: Operating hours for a single day of the week.

isOpen.description: Whether the business is open on this day.

Staff.title: Staff
Staff.description: Represents a staff member of a tenant.

commissionRate.description: Commission rate as a percentage (e.g., 40 for 40%).

active.description: Whether the staff member is currently active and schedulable.

onBreak.description: Whether the staff member is currently on a break.

breakStartTime.description: The timestamp of when the staff member started their current break.

status.description: The current working status of the staff member.

lastServedTimestamp.description: The timestamp of when the staff member last completed a service.

skillSet.description: A list of skills the staff member possesses, used for smart assignment.

services.description: A list of service IDs the staff member is qualified to perform.

ActivityLog.title: Activity Log
ActivityLog.description: An immutable record of staff activity like clock-in/out and breaks.

durationMinutes.description: Duration of the event in minutes (e.g., for breaks).

Service.title: Service
Service.description: Represents a service offered by a tenant.

category.description: The category of the service (e.g., nails, hair).

requiredSkills.description: A list of skills required to perform this service.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product used or sold by a tenant.

Client.title: Client
Client.description: Represents a client of a tenant.

notes.description: Consultation and general notes about the client.

routine.description: Client's current at-home routine and products used.

history.description: Client's past service history and experiences.

general.description: General miscellaneous notes about the client.

referralCode.description: Unique, customizable code for the client to share.

referredBy.description: The name of the client who referred this person.

successfulReferrals.description: A list of names of clients this person has successfully referred.

walletCredit.description: The amount of store credit a client has, often earned via referrals.

Appointment.title: Appointment
Appointment.description: Represents an appointment booked with a tenant.

staffId.description: The ID of the staff member performing the appointment.

isWalkIn.description: True if the appointment was created from the walk-in queue.

actualStartTime.description: The actual start time of the service, logged when staff begins.

actualEndTime.description: The actual end time of the service, logged when staff finishes.

clientEmail.description: Denormalized email of the client, primarily for walk-ins.

clientPhone.description: Denormalized phone of the client, primarily for walk-ins.

checkInStatus.description: The arrival status of the client for their appointment.

checkInToken.description: A unique, secure token for the client's check-in link.

lateTimeMinutes.description: The number of minutes the client has indicated they will be late.

automatedRescheduleOffered.description: Indicates if an automated reschedule option has been offered to a late client.

WalkIn.title: Walk-In Queue Entry
WalkIn.description: Represents a single customer in the smart walk-in queue.

clientId.description: The ID of an existing client, if applicable.

customerName.description: The name of the walk-in customer.

customerEmail.description: Email address of the walk-in customer.

estimatedDuration.description: Total estimated minutes for all requested services.

notifiedTimestamp.description: Timestamp for when the client was notified it's their turn.

serviceStartTime.description: The time the service actually began.

serviceEndTime.description: The time the service actually ended.

assignedStaffId.description: The ID of the staff member assigned to this customer.

waitForPreferredStaff.description: Whether the client wants to wait for their preferred staff member.

Bill.title: Bill
Bill.description: A recurring bill or expense for a tenant.

LifestyleProfile.title: Lifestyle Profile
LifestyleProfile.description: A financial profile representing a user's personal lifestyle costs.

BusinessProfile.title: Business Profile
BusinessProfile.description: A financial profile representing a tenant's business operating costs.

ScheduleProfile.title: Schedule Profile
ScheduleProfile.description: A profile defining a tenant's work availability and schedule.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Represents a single financial transaction (income, expense, etc.) for a tenant.

paymentMethod.description: The method of payment used for the transaction.

staffId.description: The ID of the staff member associated with the transaction.

tipAmount.description: The tip amount included in this transaction.

appointmentId.description: The ID of the appointment this transaction is associated with.

StockCorrection.title: Stock Correction
StockCorrection.description: Represents a single atomic change to inventory stock levels.

productId.description: The ID of the product being adjusted.

change.description: The amount of change (e.g., -20 for 20ml used, 1 for 1 new container).

reason.description: The reason for the correction (e.g., 'Appointment #123', 'Manual Count', 'Spoilage').

Quote.title: Quote
Quote.description: Represents a quote or proposal for a client event.

Event.title: Event
Event.description: Represents a calendar event, which could be a booked quote.

quoteId.description: The ID of the quote this event was booked from.

/tenants/{tenantId}.description: Stores tenant (business) profiles. All business-specific data is nested under this.

/tenants/{tenantId}/staff/{staffId}.description: Staff members belonging to a specific tenant.

/tenants/{tenantId}/activityLogs/{logId}.description: Immutable log of all staff activities for a tenant.

/tenants/{tenantId}/services/{serviceId}.description: Services offered by a specific tenant.

/tenants/{tenantId}/products/{productId}.description: Products sold or used by a specific tenant.

/tenants/{tenantId}/clients/{clientId}.description: Clients belonging to a specific tenant.

/tenants/{tenantId}/walkIns/{walkInId}.description: The smart queue for walk-in customers.

/tenants/{tenantId}/events/{eventId}.description: Calendar events for a tenant, including booked quotes.

/tenants/{tenantId}/quotes/{quoteId}.description: Quotes or proposals for a specific tenant.

/tenants/{tenantId}/bills/{billId}.description: Recurring bills and expenses for a specific tenant.

/tenants/{tenantId}/lifestyleProfiles/{p.description: Personal financial profiles for the user owning the tenant.

/tenants/{tenantId}/businessProfiles/{pr.description: Business cost profiles for a specific tenant.

/tenants/{tenantId}/scheduleProfiles/{pr.description: Work schedule profiles for a specific tenant.

/tenants/{tenantId}/transactions/{transa.description: Financial transaction log for a specific tenant.

/tenants/{tenantId}/stockCorrections/{co.description: An audit log of all inventory stock changes.
